error.noStream: Server did not return a streaming response

error.missingPermission: Missing browser permission to contact {{url}}. Open the extension's Options page (AI Models section) and use "Grant access" for this URL, then try again.

checkStorageError.message: Clear the screen or/and history to free storage space. Browser Storage Quota Exceeded 😭

attachment.question: [Agent] Read attachment {{id}} and send its content to the AI — Allow?

error.noPrompt: No prompt provided. Use: ai agent -p "your request"

result.maxSteps: Agent reached maximum steps without a final answer.

args.attachId: ir.attachment ID to queue as AI input attachment (attach operation)
args.maxTokens: Max output tokens per request as a cost safety limit (default {{DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS}})
args.operation: operation: connect, chat, agent, attach or stop
args.prompt: The prompt or natural language request to send
args.timeout: Max seconds to wait for a response (0 = no limit)

error.noId: No attachment id provided. Use: ai attach -i <id>

error.noPrompt: No prompt provided. Use: ai chat -p "your prompt"

error.noUrl: No URL provided. Use: ai connect -u <url>

warning.missingPermission: Warning: missing browser permission to contact {{url}}. Open the extension's Options page (AI Models section) and use "Grant access" for this URL before sending requests.

cmdAI.detail: Connect to an AI server (OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic API) and chat with it, translate natural language into terminal commands, or run an autonomous agent that executes commands iteratively.

stop.noRequest: No active AI request to stop.

args.action:
The action to launch
Can be an string, number or object

cmdAction.detail: Launch any Odoo action by numeric ID, XML-ID string, or action dict. Does not return data.

cmdAlias.detail:
Define aliases to run commands easy.
WARNING: This command uses 'local storage' to persist the data even if you close the browser. This data can be easy accessed by other computer users. Don't use sensible data if you are using a shared computer.

Can use positional parameters ($1,$2,$3,$N...)

args.barcodeDelay: The delay between barcodes reads (in ms)
args.pressDelay: The delay between presskey events (in ms)

cmdBarcode.detail: See information and send barcode strings

args.filter: The filter to apply. Example: -fi {required: true}

cmdCaf.definition: Show field definitions for a model
cmdCaf.detail: Return field metadata for the model: type, required, readonly, label, selection values, relation target, etc. To check create/read/write/unlink access rights instead, use cam.

cmdCall.detail: Call model method. Remember: Methods with @api.model decorator doesn't need the id.

cmdCam.detail: Show access rights for the selected operation on the selected model

result.haveAccessRights: You have access rights for '{{operation}}' on {{model}}

cmdChrono.definition: Print the time expended executing a command
cmdChrono.detail:
Print the elapsed time in seconds to execute a command.
Notice that this time includes the time to format the result!

args.section:
The section to clear
- screen: Clean the screen
- history: Clean the command history

args.index: Index of the match to click, 0-based (default: 0)

cmdClick.definition: Click a button or element in the current view
cmdClick.detail: Finds and clicks a button or element by visible text or CSS selector. -t matches any button whose text contains the given string (case-insensitive). -s overrides the element selector (default: button). -n picks the nth match (0-based). --list shows all matches without clicking.

error.indexOutOfRange: Index {{index}} out of range ({{count}} match(es) found)

error.keyNotPresent: The selected key is not present in the terminal context
error.operationNotSupported: This operation is currently not supported in v15.0+

cmdContextTerm.detail: Operations over terminal context dictionary. This context only affects to the terminal operations.

error.notPresent: The selected key is not present in the terminal context

cmdCopy.definition: Copy data to paste them into other instances

cmdCount.definition: Gets number of records from the given model in the selected domain
cmdCount.detail: Gets number of records from the given model in the selected domain

cmdCreate.detail: Without -v: opens an empty form view for the model. With -v: creates records directly in the database and returns a Recordset with the new IDs. -v accepts a list of value dicts.

args.onlyActive: Indicates that only print the active database name

args.field: The date or datetime field name

cmdDateRange.definition: Show min/max values for a date or datetime field
cmdDateRange.detail: Returns the minimum and maximum values of a date or datetime field on a model, optionally filtered by a domain. Validates that the field actually exists and is a date/datetime type before querying. Useful to avoid building graphs or reports over an empty or unexpected date range.

error.notDateField: Field '{{field}}' is of type '{{type}}', expected date or datetime

args.mode:
The mode
- 0: Disabled
- 1: Enabled
- 2: Enabled with Assets

cmdDebug.detail: Set the Odoo debug mode and reload the page. Values: 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled, 2 = enabled with assets.

cmdDepends.definition: Know modules that depends on the given module
cmdDepends.detail: Show a list of the modules that depends on the given module

cmdDescribe.definition: Model profile: count, date range, key fields and selection values
cmdDescribe.detail: Returns a combined profile of the model in one shot: total record count, create_date range (oldest→newest), and a table of key fields (required fields, stored relational fields, selection fields with their possible values). Replaces 3–4 separate commands (caf + count + read_group).

args.all: Show all fields, including those that are identical
args.field: Fields to compare (default: all non-binary). Use '*' for all.

cmdDiff.definition: Compare two records field by field
cmdDiff.detail: Fetches two records of the same model and compares every field value. By default shows only fields that differ. Use --all to include matching fields too. Many2one fields are compared by stored ID (not display name) to avoid false positives from renamed related records. Binary fields are excluded.

error.exactlyTwo: Exactly two record IDs are required

result.identical: Records are identical for the requested fields

cmdDis.detail: Shows the bytecode generated for the input

cmdDoc.detail: Open the built-in technical documentation page (Odoo 19.0+ only). Without -m opens the index. With -m, opens docs for that model. With -me, anchors to that method.

error.incompatibleOdooVersion: This command is only available in Odoo 19.0+

cmdEffect.detail: Play a visual UI effect. Without -t, lists all registered effect names. With -t, plays that effect. Available in Odoo 15.0+.

error.incompatibleOdooVersion: This command is only available in Odoo 15.0+

args.fieldData: The field representing the file data
args.fieldName: The field representing the file name
args.format: The format to use for exporting
args.mimetype: The MIME type of the file

cmdExportFile.definition: Export a value to a local file
cmdExportFile.detail: Save a value to disk. Formats: json (any value), csv/xml/zip (Recordset only), raw (binary with custom MIME type). zip exports each record as a separate file using --field-name and --field-data.
cmdExportFile.invalidFieldData: No field named ‘{{fieldData}}’ is found that represent the data
cmdExportFile.invalidFieldName: No field named ‘{{fieldName}}’ is found that represent the name
cmdExportFile.invalidValue: Invalid value: must be a recordset with csv and xml

cmdExportVar.definition: Exports the command result to a browser console variable
cmdExportVar.detail: Exports the command result to a browser console variable.
cmdExportVar.resultExported: Command result exported! now you can use '{{varname}}' variable in the browser console

args.enter: Dispatch Enter keydown after filling (use for search bars)
args.index: Index of the match to use, 0-based (default: 0)
args.selector: CSS selector of the input element

cmdFill.definition: Fill a text input, textarea, select, or contenteditable with a value
cmdFill.detail: Finds an element by CSS selector and sets its value, then fires input and change events so the framework reacts. Use for inputs that are NOT Odoo form field widgets (search bars, filter boxes, custom HTML inputs). For standard Odoo form fields use "form -o edit" instead. -n picks the nth match (0-based). --enter also dispatches an Enter keydown after filling (required for the Odoo search bar to submit the query).

error.indexOutOfRange: Index {{index}} out of range ({{count}} match(es) found)
error.notFillable: Element matched by "{{selector}}" is not a fillable input (input, textarea, select, or contenteditable)

args.value: The field values to set (for the edit operation)

cmdForm.definition: Interact with the current form view (get, edit, save, highlight, clear)
cmdForm.detail: get: returns in-memory field values. edit: sets field values in the open form in-memory record (fires onchanges, does not save). save: persists the current form record to the database. highlight: visually marks a field, activating its notebook tab if needed. clear: removes highlights (all fields, or just -f if given).

error.fieldNotFound: No form field '{{field}}' found in the current view
error.fieldRequired: A field name is required for the highlight operation
error.fieldsRequired: At least one field name is required for the get operation (use -f [field1, field2])
error.noFormView: No editable form view found in the current page
error.valuesRequired: Values dict is required for the edit operation (use -v {field: value, ...})

result.edited: Updated {{count}} field(s) in the current form

cmdGen.detail: Generate numbers, strings, url's, dates, etc...

cmdGenFile.detail: Open a browser file dialog and instanciates a File object with the content of the selected file

args.measure: The measure field (plain field name, e.g. amount_total — NOT sum:amount_total)
args.name: The view title

cmdGraph.detail: Open a customized graph view for a model. To retrieve grouped data without opening a view, use the read_group command instead.

error.measurePrefix: Measure field must be a plain field name (e.g. 'amount_total'), not aggregation-prefixed (e.g. 'sum:amount_total')
error.unknownFields: {{arg}}: field(s) not found on '{{model}}': {{fields}}. Use 'caf -m {{model}}' to list available fields.

cmdHelp.definition: Print this help or command detailed info
cmdHelp.detail:
Show commands and a quick definition.
- <> ~> Required Parameter
- [] ~> Optional Parameter

cmdInfo.detail: Return one piece of current session/page data. Use exactly one flag: --user-id (numeric user ID), --user-login (login name), --active-id (record ID from the current view), --active-model (model from the current view).

cmdInput.detail: Returns the data entered by the user.

button.none: No buttons found in the current view

cmdInspect.definition: Inspect interactive elements on the current page
cmdInspect.detail:
Lists elements of the given type with the terminal command to interact with each one. For LLM use: call inspect first, then use the generated commands.
Types:
  page (default) — context overview: model, record id, view type, action id, element counts
  button — all buttons with a ready-to-use "click" command
  field — Odoo form fields with a "form" command
  tab — notebook tabs with a "click" command
  menu — top navbar menu items with a "click" command
  statusbar — workflow state buttons with a "click" command
  view — view switcher (list/kanban/form/…) with a "click" command
  dialog — buttons and fields of the currently open dialog
  breadcrumb — back-navigation links with a "click" command
  record — current form record field values (in-memory)
  list — visible rows in the current list view with a "view" command per row

field.none: No form fields found in the current view

list.none: No list rows found in the current view

page.counts: Elements — buttons: {{b}}, fields: {{f}}, tabs: {{t}}, statusbar states: {{s}}
page.title: Page Overview

record.none: No form record found in the current view

statusbar.none: No status bar found in the current view

tab.none: No notebook tabs found in the current view

view.none: No view switcher found (may be single-view action)

cmdJSTest.detail: Runs js tests in desktop or mobile mode for the selected module.

result.timeout: This job is taking a long time

args.lang:
The language
Can use '__new__' for new language (empty translation template)
args.name: The language name
args.noOverwrite: Flag to indicate don't overwrite current translations

cmdLang.detail: export: downloads a .po/.csv translation file for a module. import: uploads a translation file from disk. list: prints installed language codes and names. Without extra args, export/import open the Odoo wizard instead.

error.notAvailable: Can't use lastseen, 'bus' module is not installed

args.database:
The database
Can be '*' to use current database
args.user:
The login
Can be optionally preceded by the '#' character and it will be used for password too

error.unknownDB: Unknown active database. Try using 'dblist' command.

args.operation:
The operation to do
- verbose > Print incoming notificacions
- off > Stop verbose mode
- add_channel > Add a channel to listen
- del_channel > Delete a listening channel
- start > Start client longpolling service
- stop > Stop client longpolling service

error.notAvailable: Can't use longpolling, 'bus' module is not installed

result.verboseDisabled: Now long-polling verbose mode is disabled
result.verboseEnabled: Now long-polling is in verbose mode

cmdMetadata.detail: Show ORM metadata for a record: create_uid, create_date, write_uid, write_date, noupdate flag, and XML ID.

error.notFound: Can't found any metadata for the given id

cmdNotify.detail: Displays a notification with a custom message

cmdOptions.detail: Open the OdooTerminal extension options page.

args.merge: Try to merge data (if the type is 'model')

error.invalidData: Invalid data to paste! No model defined

question.continue: This will modify the '{{model}}' model. Continue?

args.col: Fields to group by in columns
args.measure: Fields to use as measures (plain field names, e.g. amount_total — NOT sum:amount_total)
args.name: The view title
args.row: Fields to group by in rows

cmdPivot.detail: Open a customized pivot view for a model. To retrieve aggregated data without opening a view, use the read_group command instead.

error.measurePrefix: Measure fields must be plain field names (e.g. 'amount_total'), not aggregation-prefixed (e.g. 'sum:amount_total')
error.unknownFields: {{arg}}: field(s) not found on '{{model}}': {{fields}}. Use 'caf -m {{model}}' to list available fields.

cmdPost.detail: Send POST request to selected endpoint

cmdPrint.detail: Eval parameters and print the result.

args.field:
The fields to request
Can use '*' to show all fields

cmdRead.detail: Fetch one or more records by known ID(s) and return a Recordset. Use when you already have the record ID(s). Use search to find records by domain filter instead.

args.field: Fields to aggregate (measures). Omit to get only counts.

cmdReadGroup.definition: Fetch grouped and aggregated data from a model
cmdReadGroup.detail: Run an ORM read_group on a model and return the aggregated results. Each result row contains the groupby field values, the aggregated measure values, and __count. Use this instead of search when you need sums, counts, or averages per group.

cmdRef.definition: Show the referenced model and id of the given xmlid's
cmdRef.detail: Show the referenced model and id of the given xmlid's

args.dbuuid: Renew the uuid of the database
args.expires_in: Set in days the delay before database expiration.

cmdRenewDatabase.detail: Re-generate a new uuid and expiration date for your development database.

args.field:
The field names to request
Can use '*' to show all fields of the model
args.limit: The limit of records to request
args.more: Flag to indicate that show more results
args.order: The sort order. MUST be quoted because it contains spaces: -o "name ASC" or -o "id DESC, name"

error.noMoreResults: There are no more results to print
error.resultTruncated: Result truncated to {{len}} records! The query is too big to be displayed entirely.

question.showMore: There are still results to print ({{len}} records). Show more?

cmdSettings.detail: Open the Odoo Settings form view for the specified module. Does not return data.

cmdSysParam.detail: Get, set, or list parameters in ir.config_parameter model.

error.missingValue: Value parameter is required for set operation

cmdTour.detail: Runs the selected tour. If no tour given, prints all available tours.

cmdURL.detail: Extract a component from the current page URL. Use -s href for the full URL, -s hash -k model to read the model in the hash, -s search -k <param> for query string values.

cmdUal.detail: Refresh the module registry by scanning the addons path for new or updated modules. Required before installing a module that was just added to the filesystem.

result.success: The apps list has been updated successfully

The technical name of the group
A group can be optionally preceded by '!' to say 'is not in group'

cmdUhg.definition: Check if user is in the selected groups
cmdUhg.detail: Check if user is in the selected groups.

result.willRemoved: This operation will remove these modules too:

args.domain: The domain filter for the record picker

cmdView.detail: With -i: opens that record in its form view. Without -i: shows a record picker dialog filtered by -d domain. Does not return data.

args.values: Data to write (must be an array of tuples [filename, filedata, fileoptions])

funcFixed.detail: Redondea el número usando toFixed(decimales) y devuelve el resultado truncado a entero

funcFloor.detail: Redondea un número HACIA ABAJO al entero más cercano

funcStrReplace.detail: Replace the first (or all with -a) occurrences of a substring

args.begin: Start index (inclusive, negative counts from end)
args.end: End index (exclusive, negative counts from end)

funcStrSlice.detail: Return the portion of the string from begin to end (exclusive). Negative indices count from the end.

funcStrSplit.detail: Split a string by a delimiter and return an array of substrings

funcStrTrim.detail: Return the string with leading and trailing whitespace removed

funcStrUpper.detail: Return the string converted to uppercase
